response:
The answer is $200 - [cost of brushes] - [cost of canvas] - [cost of paint] = [remaining money]. 

The total cost for the brushes is $20. The canvas costs three times more than the brushes, so it is $20 * 3 = [cost of canvas]. The paint costs $8 per liter and she needs at least 5 liters, so the cost is $8 * 5 = [cost of paint]. 

Maria will earn [remaining money] from selling her painting.
